article_title: B.C. Reg. 268/2022 – Commissioner of Income Tax

briefs.title: Auto Body and Roofing Trades Added to BC Training Tax Credits — Retroactive to 2021
briefs.summary: BC amended its Training Tax Credits Regulation to add 'auto body and collision technician' as an eligible training program and rename 'roofer' classifications, with changes retroactive to April 1, 2021.
briefs.action_required: Check if your apprentices in auto body or roofing trades qualify for retroactive training tax credits back to April 1, 2021.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 268/2022 – Commissioner of Income Tax
